real_questions: How do you think about recurring fee revenue across market cycles?
How has the revenue mix shifted over time?
What is in the contribution margin?
Is there a funds transfer pricing framework that allocates deposit costs to each of your segments?
agency_intel: Moody's focuses on recurring fee revenue durability across market cycles and how the mix has shifted. Expect drill into contribution margin economics and segment-level FTP (funds transfer pricing) frameworks.
